description: Functions, requirements and uptake of essential plant nutrients; chemical and microbial processes affecting nutrient availability; diagnosis of plant and soil nutrient status; fertilizers and efficient fertilizer use in different tillage systems.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (CHEM 103,109, or115andSOIL SCI/​ENVIR ST/​GEOG  230) orSOIL SCI 301, or graduate/professional standing
